collected.policy_snippet: Of course, you’ll also provide us with information you send through or save within our Services, including content and information about that content, and content you share and generate with our AI Features (content, or “Inputs,” including text, images, video, audio, precise location, and engagement, used to generate content and responses, or “Outputs”).
collected.purpose: This explicitly states collection of images, video, audio, and precise location, which are physical data. The stated purpose is to support sharing/saving content and to generate AI content and responses.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy says, "we are always focused on privacy — and we don’t want to use more of your personal information than necessary to develop our features and models." This is a general minimization statement, but it does not provide concrete limits or specific necessity justifications for each type of physical data collected.

stored.policy_snippet: The information itself. For example, we store location information for different lengths of time based on how precise it is and which Services you use. If location information is associated with a Snap — like those saved to Memories or posted to Snap Map or Spotlight — we’ll retain that location as long as we store the Snap.
stored.purpose: This explicitly says location information is stored and retained, with duration tied to the associated Snap and service use.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: Conversely, Snaps and Chats sent in Snapchat will be deleted by default from our servers within 24 hours after we detect they’ve been opened by all recipients or have expired, unless you’ve changed your default settings or decide to save something, in which case we will honor your choices.

shared.policy_snippet: Public. Most of the features on Snapchat are private and for Friends only, but we also offer public features that allow you to opt in to showcase your best Snaps to the world, such as Spotlight, Snap Map, or your Public Profile. When you do this, those Snaps may also be discoverable outside of Snapchat, for example on the web.
shared.purpose: This explicitly states that Snaps, which can include images, video, audio, and location-associated content, may be shared publicly and become discoverable outside Snapchat when users opt into public features.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: The policy says physical data such as images, video, audio, and precise location are collected, and some such content may be publicly shared or discoverable outside Snapchat if users opt into public features. The policy also states location information may be stored for different lengths of time, and international transfer, storage, and processing of personal information may occur.

collected.policy_snippet: This includes usage information (information about how you interact with our Services — for example, which Lenses you view and apply, your premium subscriptions, Stories you watch, and how often you interact with other Snapchatters) and content information (information about content you create or provide, your engagement with the camera and creative tools, your interactions with My AI, and metadata
collected.purpose: This explicitly describes collection of behavioral data about users’ interactions, viewing habits, subscriptions, and engagement. The policy says this helps Snap understand service use and personalize and improve the experience.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy says, "we are always focused on privacy — and we don’t want to use more of your personal information than necessary to develop our features and models." This is a general minimization statement, but it does not provide concrete limits on behavioral data collection or explain necessity for each specific behavioral data type.

stored.policy_snippet: As a general rule, we keep information as long as you tell us to, and otherwise as long as we need it to provide our Services, or as required by law.
stored.purpose: This explicitly states that collected information is kept. The purpose given is to provide the Services or comply with legal requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: As a general rule, we keep information as long as you tell us to, and otherwise as long as we need it to provide our Services, or as required by law.

shared.policy_snippet: Anti-Fraud Partners. We share your information, such as device and usage information, with industry partners working to prevent fraud.
shared.purpose: This explicitly states sharing of usage information, which is behavioral data, with anti-fraud partners to prevent fraud.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: The policy states that Snap collects extensive behavioral data about how users interact with the Services, uses it for personalization, ads, analytics, and model development, and shares usage information with certain partners. Retention is broad and based on need, and international transfers are described in conditional terms, which can make the scope and duration of processing harder for users to predict.
